title: Vietnamese-Style Pork Bun
description: A fusion of Vietnamese and Indian flavors, this dish combines the richness of smoked pork with the warmth of Indian spices.
instructions: Roast cumin seeds in a dry pan over medium heat until fragrant.
Grind roasted cumin seeds into a fine powder.
In a large bowl, combine ground cumin, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt.
Add sliced pork to the bowl and mix well to coat with spice mixture.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add pork mixture. Cook until pork is browned and cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook bun according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, mix together nuong sauce, lemon juice, and ground cumin.
To assemble, place a portion of cooked pork onto a bun, followed by a drizzle of nuong sauce mixture.
Garnish with diced green chilies and serve immediately.
